projects.title: FreshCart Analytics Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end data engineering pipeline with medallion architecture for retail analytics
projects.longDescription: Complete retail analytics platform processing daily sales transactions with market basket analysis. Implements bronze-silver-gold architecture with data quality validation.
highlights: Data quality validation with Great Expectations

projects.title: Batch Data Pipeline with Observability
projects.description: Enterprise-grade batch pipeline with comprehensive monitoring and data quality
projects.longDescription: Complete batch data pipeline with full observability stack including Grafana, Prometheus, Marquez for lineage, and Soda Core for data quality validation.
highlights: Data quality validation with Soda Core

projects.title: Bank Statement Parser
projects.description: PDF bank statement parser with fund lineage visualization and interactive dashboard
projects.longDescription: Privacy-focused tool that parses PDF bank statements entirely in browser using WebAssembly. Supports multiple Indonesian bank formats with fund lineage visualization.
highlights: Interactive web dashboard with dark mode

projects.title: Hospital Data Analysis
projects.description: Healthcare data analysis with SQLite processing 800k+ Medicare records
projects.longDescription: Data engineering project that loads and analyzes US hospital charges data (2011-2015) using Python and SQLite. Handles large-scale healthcare data with proper ETL processes.

projects.title: Machine Learning - Airbnb Analysis
projects.description: ML classification and clustering for real estate data with scikit-learn
projects.longDescription: Complete ML workflow for real estate analysis including data preprocessing, KNN and Random Forest classification, K-Means clustering, and comprehensive model evaluation.
highlights: Complete ML workflow (data prep → modeling → evaluation)

projects.title: ESB ETL Pipeline
projects.description: Production ETL with idempotent operations and history tracking
projects.longDescription: Production-grade ETL pipeline for bank data with idempotent operations, history tracking for audit purposes, API pagination handling, and robust error handling.
